data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of net terms (Net-15/30/45) and due-date tracking. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that these features are implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions net terms and due-date tracking, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates these functionalities are being tracked or validated in the system.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of net terms and due-date tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for net terms and due-date tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks to verify net terms and due-date tracking functionalities.
